overall.description: Third-person gameplay from the sci-fi thriller game Fort Solis, featuring an engineer in a teal spacesuit navigating a dimly lit industrial facility. The character moves from an office through corridors into a large drill bay hangar, suffers a sudden impact that knocks them down, then explores the debris-filled area and interacts with a storage crate containing batteries.

events.description: character closes the laptop terminal displaying the Fort Solis title

agents.ego_description: sitting at desk then standing up and moving toward the office door

entered.detail: illuminated screen displaying Fort Solis logo and data
cluttered desk with papers and equipment
metal door with small window leading to corridor

segments.scene_description: The scene opens in a dimly lit office where the character interacts with a computer terminal displaying the Fort Solis title. The character stands up from the desk and walks toward the office door, preparing to exit the room.

scene_state.functional_zone: corridor with lounge area and signage

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the corridor past lounge tables toward the main hangar

entered.detail: beige metal panel walls with industrial fixtures
red fire extinguisher mounted on wall
white tables with chairs in the corridor lounge area
illuminated green exit sign pointing to Main Hangar

segments.scene_description: The character moves through a utilitarian corridor featuring a small lounge area with tables and chairs. The space is lit by warm artificial lighting, with a green illuminated sign indicating the direction to the Main Hangar ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: airlock transition to main hangar bay

events.description: character passes through the vault door into the large industrial hangar

agents.ego_description: approaching and passing through the large vault door into the hangar bay

entered.detail: large circular metal bulkhead door with locking mechanism
vast open space with teal-green industrial lighting

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a massive vault door and passes through it, transitioning from the warm corridor into a cavernous industrial hangar bathed in cool teal emergency lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: drill bay hangar with scattered debris

events.description: sudden impact throws the character forward onto the ground
dust and debris cloud erupts from the impact site
character struggles to hands and knees then stands up

agents.ego_description: being struck by an unseen force, falling hard, and slowly recovering while checking for injury

entered.detail: industrial metal floor with yellow safety stripes
stacked wall of metal storage containers
white utility vehicle flipped on its side
massive sealed door at the far end of the hangar

segments.scene_description: Immediately upon entering the hangar, the character is violently thrown forward by an unseen impact, crashing onto the metal grating floor. A cloud of dust erupts as the character tumbles, then slowly struggles to their hands and knees before recovering. The hangar is filled with industrial equipment including an overturned rover vehicle and walls of storage crates.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial hangar with machinery and storage

agents.ego_description: walking cautiously through the hangar, observing the overturned vehicle and looking for an exit

entered.detail: large equipment with conveyor belts and metal framing
large grey storage crate with TERRA logo

segments.scene_description: The character explores the expansive drill bay hangar, walking past industrial machinery and an overturned rover. The environment is bathed in cool teal lighting from overhead fixtures, with yellow safety lines marking pathways on the metal floor. The character approaches a large storage crate while surveying the area for an exit route.

scene_state.functional_zone: storage area with interactive supply crate

events.description: character opens the storage crate and examines the battery cells inside

agents.ego_description: approaching the storage crate, opening the lid, and picking up a battery cell to inspect it

entered.detail: cylindrical power cells arranged in the opened crate
handheld device showing Fort Solis battery specifications

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a large TERRA storage crate in a darker corner of the hangar. They open the crate to reveal rows of cylindrical battery cells, then pick up a data pad and battery to inspect them closely, revealing Fort Solis branding and warning labels.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a quiet, dimly lit office into a cavernous industrial hangar characterized by a sudden violent disruption. It begins with the character interacting with a computer terminal before walking out of the office and through a utilitarian corridor illuminated by warm artificial light and green directional signage. As the character passes through a massive vault door, the environment shifts abruptly from the warm hallway into a vast drill bay bathed in cool teal emergency lighting. The transition is interrupted when an unseen impact violently throws the character onto the metal grating floor amidst a cloud of dust, before they recover to navigate past an overturned rover and yellow safety lines. The scene finally settles as the character moves into a darker corner of the hangar to open a TERRA storage crate, closely inspecting cylindrical battery cells and a data pad.
